rationale: Decision Pause driven by tool outputs: error_rate latest=0.022 vs first_half_mean=0.007; last_3d_mean=0.017. p95 latency trend up (4.71% vs early/late thirds). Feedback sentiment: 5 positive / 6 negative / 20 neutral with themes ['stability', 'payment_checkout', 'activation', 'performance']. Anomalies in error_rate series: 1 day(s) flagged.

risk_register.risk: Payment/checkout instability may erode trust and increase refunds.
risk_register.mitigation: Enable feature flag rollback; hotfix duplicate webhook handling; add canary on payment path.

risk_register.risk: Latency regression under peak load if regional caches are cold.
risk_register.mitigation: Pre-warm caches; scale checkout workers; temporarily cap rollout percentage.

risk_register.risk: Mixed customer perception could amplify social complaints if external comms lag reality.
risk_register.mitigation: Publish known-issues page; proactive status updates; align support macros.

action_plan.action: Triage payment errors with provider logs; confirm duplicate webhook hypothesis.
Run anomaly dashboard review for error_rate, p95, support tickets; set alert thresholds.
Draft internal summary + external status comms acknowledging elevated errors.
Prepare staged rollback playbook and verify feature flag ownership.

communication_plan.internal: Share tool-derived summary: error_rate spike, latency trend, ticket volume vs baseline; explicit go/pause/rollback trigger table.
communication_plan.external: Transparent messaging: we are investigating elevated payment errors; workaround steps; ETA for update.

what_would_increase_confidence: More confidence with longer post-fix bake time, provider-side confirmation of webhook behavior, and segmented error attribution (client vs server vs third-party).
